ERR_AUTO_SCALE_DENIED.human_message_template: Blocked because autoscale is not allowed by the active boundary for request {request_id}.
ERR_AUTO_SCALE_DENIED.suggested_fix_template: Disable autoscale or publish an approved exception.

ERR_BUDGET_TOKEN_EXHAUSTED.human_message_template: Blocked because the budget token is exhausted for request {request_id}.
ERR_BUDGET_TOKEN_EXHAUSTED.suggested_fix_template: Use a funded token or reduce requested cost.

ERR_COST_LIMIT.human_message_template: Blocked because projected cost exceeds the active boundary for request {request_id}.
ERR_COST_LIMIT.suggested_fix_template: Lower cost, shorten runtime, or request approval.

ERR_DUPLICATE_JSON_KEYS.human_message_template: Blocked because duplicate JSON keys were found in request {request_id}.
ERR_DUPLICATE_JSON_KEYS.suggested_fix_template: Send canonical JSON with unique keys.

ERR_EXECUTION_ID_ALREADY_CONSUMED.human_message_template: Blocked because execution id {execution_id} was already consumed.

ERR_EXECUTION_ID_REPLAYED.human_message_template: Blocked because execution id {execution_id} was replayed.
ERR_EXECUTION_ID_REPLAYED.suggested_fix_template: Create a new execution id and nonce.

ERR_FORBIDDEN_ACTION_IN_PARAMETERS.human_message_template: Blocked because forbidden parameters were present in request {request_id}.

ERR_GPU_LIMIT.human_message_template: Blocked because requested GPU count exceeds the active boundary for request {request_id}.
ERR_GPU_LIMIT.suggested_fix_template: Lower GPU count or request an exception.

ERR_HISTORICAL_POLICY_MISSING.human_message_template: Receipt cannot be verified because historical policy proof is missing for policy {policy_version}.
ERR_HISTORICAL_POLICY_MISSING.suggested_fix_template: Provide the policy proof bundle for the receipt policy hash.

ERR_HOURS_LIMIT.human_message_template: Blocked because requested runtime exceeds the active boundary for request {request_id}.
ERR_HOURS_LIMIT.suggested_fix_template: Lower hours or request an exception.

ERR_INTEGER_OVERFLOW.human_message_template: Blocked because integer bounds were exceeded in request {request_id}.

ERR_INVALID_JSON_NUMBER.human_message_template: Blocked because JSON number syntax is invalid in request {request_id}.

ERR_INVALID_JSON_SYNTAX.human_message_template: Blocked because JSON syntax is invalid in request {request_id}.

ERR_INVALID_POLICY_SIGNATURE.human_message_template: Blocked because the policy signature is invalid for policy {policy_version}.
ERR_INVALID_POLICY_SIGNATURE.suggested_fix_template: Publish a policy signed by an allowed key.

ERR_KILL_SWITCH.human_message_template: Blocked because the kill switch is active for request {request_id}.
ERR_KILL_SWITCH.suggested_fix_template: Clear the incident state before retrying.

ERR_MANUAL_APPROVAL_REQUIRED.human_message_template: Blocked because request {request_id} requires manual approval.
ERR_MANUAL_APPROVAL_REQUIRED.suggested_fix_template: Request approval or reduce requested scope.

ERR_NON_DETERMINISTIC_INPUT.human_message_template: Blocked because nondeterministic fields were present in request {request_id}.
ERR_NON_DETERMINISTIC_INPUT.suggested_fix_template: Remove timestamps, nonces, sessions, and step dependency fields from the canonical request.

ERR_POLICY_ENVELOPE_INVALID.human_message_template: Policy proof envelope is invalid for policy {policy_hash}.
ERR_POLICY_ENVELOPE_INVALID.suggested_fix_template: Regenerate the proof bundle from signed policy artifacts.

ERR_POLICY_HASH_MISMATCH.human_message_template: Policy proof hash mismatch for policy {policy_hash}.
ERR_POLICY_HASH_MISMATCH.suggested_fix_template: Use the exact policy artifact referenced by the receipt.

ERR_POLICY_KEYSET_MISSING.human_message_template: Policy proof key set is missing for policy {policy_hash}.
ERR_POLICY_KEYSET_MISSING.suggested_fix_template: Provide the required key set artifact.

ERR_POLICY_KEY_ID_MISMATCH.human_message_template: Blocked because policy key id does not match policy key material for policy {policy_version}.
ERR_POLICY_KEY_ID_MISMATCH.suggested_fix_template: Publish a policy with matching key id and public key.

ERR_POLICY_MANIFEST_INVALID.human_message_template: Policy proof manifest is invalid for policy {policy_hash}.

ERR_POLICY_MULTIPLE_MATCHES.human_message_template: Policy proof has multiple matches for policy {policy_hash}.

ERR_POLICY_PROOF_UNRESOLVED.human_message_template: Policy proof could not be resolved for policy {policy_hash}.
ERR_POLICY_PROOF_UNRESOLVED.suggested_fix_template: Provide a local proof bundle containing the policy hash.

ERR_POLICY_SIGNATURE_INVALID.human_message_template: Policy proof signature is invalid for policy {policy_hash}.
ERR_POLICY_SIGNATURE_INVALID.suggested_fix_template: Use a signature from an allowed key.

ERR_POLICY_VERSION_MISMATCH.human_message_template: Blocked because policy version mismatch occurred for policy {policy_version}.
ERR_POLICY_VERSION_MISMATCH.suggested_fix_template: Use the exact policy version referenced by the receipt.

ERR_RECEIPT_SIGNATURE_INVALID.human_message_template: Receipt signature could not be verified for request {request_id}.

ERR_REPLAY_MISMATCH.human_message_template: Replay did not match the stored receipt for request {request_id}.
ERR_REPLAY_MISMATCH.suggested_fix_template: Open the replay report before trusting this proof.

ERR_RETRY_LIMIT.human_message_template: Blocked because retry count exceeds the active boundary for request {request_id}.
ERR_RETRY_LIMIT.suggested_fix_template: Lower retries or request an exception.

ERR_RUNTIME_COST_DRIFT.human_message_template: Blocked because runtime cost exceeded the approved request {request_id}.
ERR_RUNTIME_COST_DRIFT.suggested_fix_template: Inspect cost telemetry and runtime expansion.

ERR_RUNTIME_GPU_DRIFT.human_message_template: Blocked because runtime GPU usage exceeded the approved request {request_id}.

ERR_RUNTIME_HOURS_DRIFT.human_message_template: Blocked because runtime hours exceeded the approved request {request_id}.

ERR_SCHEMA_VALIDATION.human_message_template: Blocked because request schema is invalid for request {request_id}.
ERR_SCHEMA_VALIDATION.suggested_fix_template: Fix the request shape and retry.

ERR_TOOL_CALL_SEQUENCE.human_message_template: Blocked because tool call order is invalid for request {request_id}.
ERR_TOOL_CALL_SEQUENCE.suggested_fix_template: Send tool calls in the approved order.

ERR_TYPE_MISMATCH.human_message_template: Blocked because a field type is invalid in request {request_id}.

OK_ALLOW.human_message_template: Allowed by active MNDe policy for request {request_id}.
